/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/minimalClient.dir/samples/MinimalClient/MinimalClient.cpp.o -o minimalClient   -L/CrazySim/crazyswarm2_ws/src/motion_capture_tracking/motion_capture_tracking/deps/libmotioncapture/deps/NatNetSDKCrossplatform/lib/ubuntu  -Wl,-rpath,/CrazySim/crazyswarm2_ws/src/motion_capture_tracking/motion_capture_tracking/deps/libmotioncapture/deps/NatNetSDKCrossplatform/lib/ubuntu -lNatNet
